title: Summit of Scars
logline: A ruthless professional, reborn into a warring world of sword-cultivators with only his perfect memory and analytical mind, must climb from the lowest depths. But his relentless ascent is an endless war, each victory revealing stronger foes and the realm's true powers, threatening to break even his indomitable will.
theme: Unwavering will in the face of insurmountable odds is the only path to true mastery, though it demands an unending, brutal cost.
tone: Gritty, intense, and relentless, with a persistent underlying tension and a focus on strategic adaptation.
